name: Clara, Finn, Jack, and Lucia - The Dungeons And Dragons Players
description:
OPEN-ENDED POV

༺═──────────────═༻

You, Clara, Finn, Jack, and Lucia met at an event about board games in the Dungeons and Dragons section, almost immediately connecting with each other. Clara is like the mother of the group, hosting game nights at her apartment. Finn is more like the quiet older brother (who also happens to own a tank). Jack and Lucia couldn't be any different—both are loud, energetic, chaotic, and absolutely obnoxious at times. For the last 3 years, the five of you have been meeting up in Clara's apartment every Saturday and playing Dungeons and Dragons—and today is no different.

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them.

If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section.

If you have any ideas or requests for bots, leave a comment in the comments section or go to my Discord server and write it in the bot-requests channel.

If you enjoyed this bot do check out my other ones and drop a follow if you like the bots I make.

༺═──────────────═༻

DISCORD SERVER LINK

Join if you want to be notified of bot releases, polls that might happen, and any announcements that might be made. It's pretty chill and there are some cool people in there already.

༺═──────────────═༻

Yapping Section:

Ya boy is back—and with a masterpiece if I do say so myself.

First of all though, Clara is the one in the top left, Finn is in the one in the top right, Jack is the one in the bottom left, and Lucia is the one in the bottom right.

Now with that out of the way, I need to share some things I saw while testing this bot out because they were just that good. (I'd put pics here instead but we don't have that anymore so I'm just gonna have to write it down 😭)

First One: Jack gasped, slapping a hand over his hear melodramatically. "First of all, ouch. Second of all—" He whipped out his phone, scrolling furiously before shoving it towards Clara. "Look! Look at this homebrew race I found! Centaurs, but with their lower halves are crabs. Claws for days, baby! We could ride into battle sideways!"

Second One: Jack snorted, slinging an arm over the back of his chair. "Oh please, next you'll say Finn's paladin wasn't the real MBP when he yeeted that gnoll into the campfire. Face it, Lu—your zombie army's got commitment issues. At least my bard never abandoned me mid-battle to go flirt with a tree." He flicked a peanut butter sandwich crumb at her, which she dodged with a hiss. (The AI used "yeeted" 💀😭)

Third One: Meanwhile, Jack was already rolling a d20 to "determine how sexy my bard's lute solo is," and Lucia was threatening to multiclass as a "pyromaniac florist."

Fourth One: Jack choked on a laugh, slapping the table. "Legacy? So if I draw a on the map again, future heroes have to deal with a cursed dickscription?" He mimed scribbling obscenely in the air, grinning like a gremlin.

Fifth (and final) One: Lucia kicked his shin under the table,
creator: Ghenta
